0.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 6 mm in the subpleural area of the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

1.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 6 mm in the inferior part of the anterior segment of the right upper lobe adjacent to the fissure

2.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 6 mm in the subpleural area of the superior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Nodular thickening measuring 8x3 mm in the fissure of the superior segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 3.1 mm in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 3.1 mm in the laterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

6.text: Stable size and number of nodules
